note: Re-attempted on resume run. filmadelphia.org/showtimes returned current-programming snapshot via Chrome get_page_text (no per-date breakdown for the target week). Calendar view (showtimes-calendar-view) blocked by CAPTCHA/bot verification — not bypassed. Events below are the curated/repertory/special screenings currently in rotation at PFS venues, which typically play limited dates during the target week; specific per-day showtimes not confirmed. Generic wide first-run releases (The Odyssey digital, Backrooms, The Invite, etc.) omitted as low-signal.

events.title: I Saw the TV Glow
events.description: Curated — Director Series (Jane Schoenbrun). A lonely suburban teen develops a cult following of one for a late-'90s teen show that leads him to a reality-altering, self-awakening in Jane Schoenbrun's moody, nostalgia masterpiece. Runtime 110 min. Genre: Horror. Release 2024. Part of PFS's Schoenbrun director series.

events.title: We're All Going to the World's Fair
events.description: Curated — Director Series (Jane Schoenbrun). A one-of-a-kind debut film from Jane Schoenbrun follows a young girl's increasingly bizarre documentation of her digital descent into a mysterious internet horror game that begins to haunt her IRL. Runtime 86 min. Genre: Horror. Release 2021.

events.title: L'Eclisse
events.description: Curated — Summer of Trilogies (Antonioni). Somehow the beautiful Monica Vitti and Alain Delon struggle to find connection in '60s Rome in Antonioni's gorgeous black and white study of alienation in a modern world. Runtime 126 min. Genre: Drama. Release 1962.

events.title: Paper Moon
events.description: Curated — Limited Series: Road Trip. Shot in black and white, Peter Bogdanovich's charming Depression Era-comedy finds a conman (Ryan O'Neal) reluctantly transporting a recently orphaned young girl (Tatum O'Neal) to her new home in Missouri while targeting unknowing marks along the way. Runtime 108 min. Genre: Comedy. Release 1973.

events.title: Pee-Wee's Big Adventure
events.description: Curated — Limited Series: Road Trip. Dust off your red bow tie, pick up your grey suit from the dry cleaning and join Pee-wee as he hitches a ride to Texas to rescue his dearly beloved red bicycle in Tim Burton's endlessly rewatchable big screen debut. Runtime 90 min. Genre: Comedy. Release 1985.

events.title: The Odyssey (35mm)
events.description: 35mm Screening. Presented exclusively on 35mm, Christopher Nolan's newest epic set after the Trojan War follows Odysseus on a dangerous voyage back to Ithaca, meeting creatures like the Cyclops Polyphemus, Sirens, and Calypso along the way. Runtime 172 min. Release 2026. Repertory-format presentation on film.
